saving_throw.value: Will negates (harmless); , ability check , or skill check the target attempts, it rolls twice and takes the more favorable result. For every 5 caster levels you have, the target can roll twice on an additional attack roll, saving throw, ability check, or skill check (to a maximum of 5 rolls at 20th level). Hermean potential is countered and dispelled by ill omen , but does not itself counter or dispel ill omen .
